name: [YAOC2 Sandbox] MISP Enrich + OpenCTI Sync
_doc: Sandbox workflow for action: ioc_enrichment_misp_opencti. Called by the policy gateway after an allow/approval decision. Receives action + parameters from the gateway, searches MISP for the IOC, enriches via Cortex analysers, pushes results to OpenCTI, and returns a structured result to the gateway.
